title: Garcia v. Character Technologies filed
description: Wrongful death lawsuit filed in U.S. District Court, Middle District of Florida. Anchor event for this study.

title: Additional lawsuits filed in Texas
description: Second wrongful death suit and related claims against Character.AI filed by Texas families.

title: Character.AI announces teen safety features
description: Announcement of new under-18 model, parental controls, and content moderation, following the Garcia v. Character Technologies filing in October.

title: Case terminated
description: Case terminated per CourtListener docket. Reporting indicates settlement.
